title: Automated Sales Analytics Workflows
roleContext: Pinterest · Senior Data Scientist / Data Scientist
summary: A suite of automated analytics workflows that turn complex behavioral data into revenue-focused narratives for sales teams.
problem: Sales and go-to-market teams needed faster, repeatable ways to translate behavioral signals into client-ready stories without manual, one-off analysis.
approach: Designed datasets and transformations to capture advertiser and user behavior at the right level of granularity.
Built automated workflows to generate narrative-ready outputs, balancing statistical rigor with interpretability.
Partnered with sales and product stakeholders to define success metrics and iterate on prototypes.
outcomes: Improved sales team productivity by reducing the time-to-insight for key accounts.
Enabled more consistent, data-backed narratives for advertising partners.
Contributed to measurable increases in ad revenue through better use of behavioral insights.

title: Global Analytical Insights Platform
summary: An end-to-end analytical insights tool used globally and tied to tens of millions in annual revenue.
problem: Client teams needed a scalable way to surface relevant behavioral insights across markets without rebuilding bespoke analyses.
approach: Owned the full lifecycle of an end-to-end analytics tool built with Python, SQL, and Spark.
Implemented reusable templates and guardrails to keep insights statistically sound and on-brand.
Collaborated with product and engineering to scale the tool’s performance and coverage.
outcomes: Tool was tied to over $65M of revenue in 2021.
Became a central part of how teams framed opportunities and performance in client conversations.
Reduced manual analysis workload and enabled consistent insights across regions.

title: Hackathon: Cost-Savings Tooling
summary: Hackathon projects that evolved into stop-gap automated tools delivering multi-million dollar cost savings.
problem: Several workflows were expensive or inefficient, and there was no short-term path to fully productized solutions.
approach: Identified high-impact cost centers where targeted automation could provide immediate wins.
Rapidly prototyped analytical tools to plug key gaps while long-term roadmaps were in progress.
Partnered with engineering and product teams to harden the most successful prototypes.
outcomes: Recognized as a 3x company-wide hackathon award winner.
Estimated around $10M in cost savings across the most impactful tools.
Provided a blueprint for turning experimental analytics tooling into productized workflows.
